hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String))

commands.name: generate-crds
commands.description: Generates CRDs from a provided assembly into a provided output folder

options.name: --kubernetes-version
options.description: The version of the Kubernetes CRD API to target. This must be either "v1" or "v1beta1".

commands.name: build-crds
commands.description: Builds the project and generates CRD yaml files for the custom resources in the project

options.name: --kubernetes-version
options.description: The version of the Kubernetes CRD API to target. This must be either "v1" or "v1beta1".
